theme: Skia m150 and new rendering APIs
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.150.0 updates to Skia milestone m150 and adds overdraw visualization and image filter APIs.
highlights_body: This release brings new APIs for overdraw visualization, crop and empty image filters, fast bounds culling, and a cached SKCanvas wrapper. Obsolete v4 pre-release members are promoted to errors, .NET Interactive support is removed, and HarfBuzz is updated to 14.2.1.

breaking.title: Pre-v4 obsolete API members are now compile errors
breaking.body: Members marked [Obsolete(error:true)] in the v4 preview series are no longer callable; any remaining uses will produce compile errors. Migrate to the replacement APIs indicated by the obsolete message before upgrading.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to m150, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work.
Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m150 branch have been merged for improved stability.
A raster pipeline blur regression for small sigma values is fixed by defining SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS.
A new overdraw visualization color filter lets developers highlight over-drawn pixels for performance analysis.
Two new image filter factories — CreateCrop for region-limited filtering and CreateEmpty for a passthrough filter — are now available.
GetFastBounds returns the conservative bounding box for a paint in a single call, useful for quick-reject culling before drawing.
The deprecated SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls and .NET Interactive integration has been removed. Migrate to standard MAUI controls.
The SKCanvas wrapper returned by SKSurface.Canvas is now cached, avoiding repeated allocations on every access.
The bundled HarfBuzz text-shaping library has been updated to version 14.2.1.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Fixed the small-sigma raster blur regression, added SKSurface.Canvas caching, and promoted pre-v4 obsolete members to compile errors

preview_summaries.v4.150.0-rc.1.1: Release Candidate 1 added SKPaint.GetFastBounds, overdraw and crop/empty image filters, the blur regression fix, SKCanvas caching, and the final set of upstream m150 cherry-picks.
preview_summaries.v4.150.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 promoted pre-v4 obsolete members to compile errors, removed .NET Interactive support, and updated HarfBuzz to 14.2.1.
preview_summaries.v4.150.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m150.

harfbuzz_summary: Updates HarfBuzzSharp to 14.2.1 as part of this release's security and dependency refresh.
